    rotpointX(Location, double, Location) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Rotates a point around a pivot on the XZ-plane by a specified angle in degrees.
    rotpointY(Location, double, Location) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Rotates a point around the Y-axis relative to a specified pivot point by a given angle.
    rotpointZ(Location, double, Location) - Static method in class xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.Util
    Rotates a 3D point around the Z-axis by a specified angle relative to a pivot point.
